title: Reflection Journal Comments
description: Synthetic starter comment bank for testing reflection-journal review workflows.

comments.label: Thoughtful insight
comments.text: The reflection shows thoughtful insight about the work or process.

comments.label: Reflection too general
comments.text: Make the reflection more specific so it shows what was learned.

comments.label: Specific example used
comments.text: A specific example helps explain the reflection.

comments.label: Add process detail
comments.text: Add a detail from the process to make the reflection more concrete.

comments.label: Clear next step
comments.text: The next step is clear and connected to the reflection.

comments.label: Next step needed
comments.text: Name one specific next step for future work.
